name: WrenOS Agent
description: Crypto trading agent with private inference and meme discovery

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Telegram bot token for operator chat UX

TELEGRAM_CHAT_ALLOWLIST.description: Optional comma-separated Telegram chat IDs allowed to interact with bot

AGENT_WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Agent hot wallet private key (only for execution-enabled flows)

RAILWAY_PUBLIC_DOMAIN.description: Railway-assigned public domain (if gateway/webhook routing is enabled)

OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_BASE_URL.description: Optional explicit OpenClaw gateway/proxy base URL override
